content.speakerText: Just sign here, and I'll hand you the stuff.
content.speakerTextCn: 在这儿签个字，我就把东西给你。

options.text: Can I take it home and sign later?
Could you sign for me instead?

content.explanation: 正确答案'I'll sign it right away.'是对请求的直接积极回应，符合职场高效流程。干扰项中，'Can I take it home...'拖延流程，'I don't need this...'否定需求，'Could you sign for me...'推卸责任，均不符合职场签字确认的规范情境。

content.speakerText: Could you please confirm your signature on this form before we process your request?
content.speakerTextCn: 在处理您的申请前，您能确认一下这份表格上的签名吗？

options.text: I forgot my pen, can I use yours?
I think I already signed it last week.
Why do I need to sign again?

content.explanation: 正确答案'Sure, I'll sign it now.'直接回应确认请求，体现合作态度。干扰项中，'I forgot my pen'转移焦点，'I already signed'否认当前需求，'Why do I need to...'表达不满，均不符合职场礼貌与效率原则。

content.speakerText: Please sign here to acknowledge receipt of your equipment.
content.speakerTextCn: 请在此签名以确认收到您的设备。

options.text: I'll send you a scanned copy later.

content.explanation: 正确答案'Signed. Thank you.'简洁专业，符合签字确认场景的惯用表达。干扰项中，'Is this mandatory?'质疑流程，'I'll send a scanned copy'延迟执行，'Can I just nod?'非正式且无效，均不符合正式文书确认要求。

content.template: Just sign ___ here, and I'll hand you the stuff.
content.hint: 指明签名的具体位置，是签字确认场景的核心表达
content.knowledgePoint: 地点副词here在指令中的使用

content.template: I'd like to ___ the form before submitting it.
content.hint: 完成流程前的关键动作，与'签字确认'场景直接相关
content.knowledgePoint: 动词sign与表格/文件的固定搭配

content.template: Once you've ___ the document, your request will be processed.
content.hint: 完成签字后的状态，是流程推进的前提
content.knowledgePoint: 过去分词signed作完成状态的动词形式

content.speakerText: Just sign here, and I'll hand you the stuff.
content.speakerTextCn: 在这儿签个字，我就把东西给你。
expectedAnswers: Signing now — I'll hand it back in a second.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表示已接受并执行签字动作
语言准确性：语法正确，用词符合职场语境
表达自然度：语气礼貌、简洁，符合高效流程要求
关键词覆盖：使用了sign, here, hand等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Please sign this form to confirm your acceptance of the policy.
content.speakerTextCn: 请签署这份表格以确认您接受该政策。
expectedAnswers: Just a moment, I'm signing now.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰表明将立即签署或已完成签署
语言准确性：动词使用正确，时态与语境匹配
表达自然度：符合职场日常沟通的简洁与礼貌风格
关键词覆盖：使用了sign, confirm, form, policy等场景关键词

content.speakerText: We need your signature to finalize your equipment checkout.
content.speakerTextCn: 我们需要您的签名来完成设备领取流程。
expectedAnswers: Signed! Let me know if you need anything else.
Alright, I've signed — thanks for your help.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确回应签名要求并推动流程完成
语言准确性：动词和介词搭配准确，无语法错误
表达自然度：语气积极、专业，体现合作态度
关键词覆盖：使用了signature, finalize, equipment, checkout等核心词汇
